title: Systematic evaluation of single-cell RNA-seq analyses performance based on long-read sequencing platforms
source: Deng et al., Journal of Advanced Research, 2025

L2: Systematic comparison of single-cell RNA-seq performance across long-read sequencing platforms
Long-read sequencing enables improved transcript-level analysis in single-cell genomics
L3: Comprehensive systematic evaluation comparing single-cell RNA sequencing analysis performance across long-read sequencing platforms including PacBio and Oxford Nanopore, assessing accuracy, throughput, and analytical capabilities for transcriptome profiling at single-cell resolution
